svg.aria-label: STRATA story: a sleeping engineered organism in a biotech lab detects incoming hexavalent chromium, wakes up, biosenses and reduces it to trivalent chromium via NemA, dissolves on kill-switch activation, and a new organism hatches to resume monitoring -- an 18-second seamless pixel-art loop.
svg.desc: A sleeping engineered BMO in a biotech lab detects incoming Cr(VI), awakens and biosenses it, reduces it to Cr(III) via NemA enzyme, then triggers the kill switch and dissolves. A new organism hatches from the incubation chamber to resume monitoring. The animation runs in a seamless 18-second loop with continuous ambient motion.
svg.text: S T R A T A
